name: CaldavSync
short: Create Schedule based on CalDAV enties
description: Post a message with CalDAV Events on selected Discord channel.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores CalDAV credentials and configuration for the server.
install_msg: Thanks for installing my cog! First, set up your credientials with `[p]caldavset server https://your-caldav-server.com/` `[p]caldavset username` `[p]caldavset password` `[p]caldavset channel #channel` .
author: SkillFur
